title: Everbuild All Purpose Powder Filler – Suitable for Interior and Exterior Use – Quick Drying – White – 600g (450g + 300g Free) (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
HIGH-STRENGTH – Strong powder filler for indoor/outdoor repairs to most building materials including plaster, plasterboard, render, stone, brick and wood.
EXTRA TOUGH – Contains added PVA for extra strength. Can be nailed or screwed into once dry.
EASY TO USE – This wall filler must always be overpainted with oil-based primer and a top coat to protect the filler when used externally.
NON-SHRINK FORMULATION – Designed to be crack resistant and withstand shrinkage.
OVER-PAINTABLE – Over-stainable and over-paintable with most solvent-based and emulsion paints.
RANGE OF SIZES – Also available in 450g, 1.5kg, and 5kg packs.
